updateNote: Day 25 morning refresh: Lebanon expels Iran's ambassador (persona non grata), Araghchi signals deal readiness to Witkoff/Kushner, IDF overnight strikes on Tehran IRGC HQ + Intelligence Ministry, Iranian missile hits Tel Aviv residential area (4 injured), Iran appoints hardline IRGC veteran Zolghadr as new security chief.
